brand_identity.name: Decorous
brand_identity.mission: To be the #1 construction and design partner in Odisha, delivering premium quality and engineering excellence.
brand_identity.target_audience: Homeowners, Business Owners, Industries in Odisha looking for quality construction.

accent.description: Gold - Luxury, Quality, High Visibility for CTAs

buttons.primary: bg-[#F5A623] text-black hover:bg-[#e09612] font-semibold rounded-md shadow-md transition-all duration-200 hover:shadow-lg active:scale-95 px-8 py-3
buttons.secondary: bg-[#1a365d] text-white hover:bg-[#132845] font-semibold rounded-md transition-all duration-200 px-8 py-3
buttons.outline: border-2 border-[#1a365d] text-[#1a365d] hover:bg-[#1a365d] hover:text-white font-medium rounded-md transition-all duration-200 px-6 py-2

cards.service_card: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-lg shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-300 overflow-hidden group border-t-4 border-t-[#F5A623]
cards.feature_card: bg-slate-50 p-8 rounded-xl border border-slate-100 hover:border-[#F5A623]/30 transition-colors
cards.testimonial_card: bg-white p-8 rounded-2xl shadow-sm border border-slate-100 relative

inputs.default: flex h-12 w-full rounded-md border border-slate-300 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-white file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-slate-500 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-[#1a365d] focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

hero.alt: Modern luxury residential house exterior by Decorous

visual_enhancers.gradients: bg-gradient-to-br from-[#1a365d] to-[#0f2442] (Use sparingly for Hero/Footer only)

lead_generation_features.floating_whatsapp: Fixed bottom-right button, z-50, vivid green (#25D366)
lead_generation_features.sticky_header_cta: Mobile only: Fixed bottom bar with 'Call Now' and 'Get Quote' buttons
lead_generation_features.forms: Multi-step cost calculator, simple inline lead capture in Hero (Name, Phone, Service)

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text over primary blue is white. Text over accent gold must be black.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use 'Manrope' for all headings and 'IBM Plex Sans' for body text. Add imports to index.css.
Implement the 'Cost Calculator' as a multi-step wizard using Shadcn Tabs or custom state.
Ensure the 'Get a Quote' button is visible in the sticky header.
Create a dedicated 'Services' dropdown in the navigation.
Use the provided image URLs for specific sections. Do not use placeholders.
Footer must be dark (#1a365d) with gold accents.
For the 'Projects' page, use a masonry or grid layout with category filters.
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for text.
Avoid centering long blocks of text.
Use generous padding (py-20) for major sections.
Ensure mobile responsiveness for all tables and grids.
